title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Mahindra & Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Mahindra & Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Mahindra & Mahindra in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra & Mahindra:
Mahindra & Mahindra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra!
